subject: [RFC PATCH v2 1/7] mm, swap: add virtual swap device infrastructure

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch introduces the virtual swap device infrastructure, which creates a massive virtual swap device at boot using dynamic cluster allocation. The infrastructure includes per-cluster dynamic information and a side table for vswap backend metadata. The patch is part of a larger series that will enable hot paths to skip per-device bookkeeping and allow backends such as zswap and zero to interact with the vswap layer. The virtual swap device cannot be swapon'd or swapoff'd yet, but this patch lays the groundwork for subsequent patches to implement these features.
